titleStmt.title: SII 16.247: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 247. (A.R. No. 731 of 1919.) HAḶIGERA, ALUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Āñjanēyasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1482, Raudri, Mārgaśira ba. 6, corresponding to 1560 A.D., December 8, (Sunday).

It seems to register the gift of the income in cash and grains from the villages Haḷigera and others included in Ādavani-durga by Śrīraṅgarāju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siddhirāju Avubhaḷarāju to the temple of Kēśavaperumāḷ for the merit of his parents for conducting a feeding house to the itinerant brāhmaṇas who used the military road. The donor seems to have obtained the villages granted as amara-uṁbaḷi from Veṅkaṭādri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
varuṣaṁbulu 1482 Agunēṭi raUdri saṁva
tsara mārgaśira ba 6 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarāya
mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhu
layi pṛthvisāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīman
mahāmaṁḍalēśvara siddhirāju ĀUbaḷarājugāri kumā
ruḍu śrīraṁgarājugāru hālaharivi kēśavaperumāḷakunu
Ā hālaharivi polaṁlō daṁḍudōvanu paradēśi brāṁhmala
satrānakunnu cellēṭi haḷigeragrāmamaṁdu mā Ādavāni
durgānaku cellēṭi vanikōṭalōni grāmāluṁnu sarvamānya
ṁgā yiccina śilāśāsanakrama meṭlannanu māku veṁkaṭādri
[A]yyavāru Amara Uṁbbaḷiki pāliṁccina Āda
vānidurgānaku cellēṭi haḷigera grāmamaṁdula sa
ku cellē rokhadānyālu mātalligāri
ṁḍrādulaku puṇyaṁ
sarvamānyaṁgā dhāra
yaṁgānu Anu
dānapāla
sāda
The rest of the slab is broken and missing.
Digital edition of SII 16.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
